author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Stegosaurus featured four sharp bony spikes on its tail, known as a thagomizer, which it used for defense against predators.
The brain of Stegosaurus was incredibly small, roughly the size of a walnut, despite the animal weighing up to 5 tons.
